overall.description: Static first-person view of a dimly lit cyberpunk-style apartment bedroom from a video game, featuring moody green neon lighting, a messy bed in the foreground, and checkered wall tiles. The scene remains completely stationary throughout the clip with no visible movement or action.

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view of a cyberpunk-style apartment bedroom at night. The camera remains fixed near ground level, showing an unmade bed in the foreground, a distinctive checkered tile wall to the left with a white armchair, and moody green ambient lighting throughout the room. A glowing floor heater and ceiling light panel provide warm illumination contrasts, while no movement or action occurs during the entire clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a moody, nocturnal atmosphere. It begins at a low angle near the ground, focusing on the textures of an unmade bed in the immediate foreground. As the eye wanders across the space, the view encompasses a distinctive checkered tile wall to the left paired with a solitary white armchair. The scene is defined by a constant interplay of light, where moody green ambient tones are punctuated by the warm glow of a floor heater and a ceiling light panel. The environment remains entirely still, preserving a sense of quiet isolation throughout the shot.
